## ![][image1]

Timeline Questionnaire Template \- Wedding

**Why it matters:** This questionnaire gathers info about what a couple has booked and planned thus far in the planning process and helps remind them to figure these details out if they haven’t already. Once your couple has filled it out, their answers should give you insight into creating their photo coverage timeline and how to best document their wedding day.

**When to send:** I typically send this 3 months out from a couple’s wedding day (unless they request the questionnaire earlier) or are planning on a very short timeframe.

---

Timeline Questionnaire \- Wedding

**Your Day**

* Please confirm your wedding date (Month, Day, Year) and what day of the week it falls on, here (of course I know this already—I just like to confirm):

* What will be the best mailing address for the two of you after your wedding day?

* What are your Instagram & Facebook handles? I’d love to follow you two\!

* Please list one emergency contact for my records (name, relation, and phone number):

* Now that you have a clearer idea of how you want your wedding day to be, how would you describe your "vision" for your wedding day?

* Describe what your wedding is going to look like—including your colors, themes, styles, or vibes. Any details are helpful\!

* In planning your wedding thus far, what have you found to be most important to you about your wedding experience?

**Your Timeline**

* What sounds like a perfect way to start out your wedding day from the time you get up? How would you like to start your morning?

* Where are each of you getting ready? Please include the name of the location, an address, and a link to your accommodation and/or a description of the rooms.

* What time will you start getting ready?

* Are you planning on helping each other get ready or will you be doing it separately?

* Will you be doing a “first look” (a special experience of seeing each other in your wedding clothes for the first time as a “surprise”)? If so, where?

* Are there any special details that you have as a part of your day and would like captured? (i.e. accessories, shoes, jewelry, vows, invitations or announcements, flowers, heirlooms, gifts, etc.)

* Where will your ceremony be? Please include the name of the location, an address, and a link to the ceremony location or a description of the place.

* What time does your ceremony begin?

* What do you plan to do during your ceremony, and how long do you think it will last? (i.e. read handwritten vows, exchange rings, play or listen to a song, etc.)

* Do you have a cocktail hour planned between the ceremony and reception? If so, what time does it start and end? Where is it taking place? 

* Where is your reception venue? Please include the name of the location, an address, and a link to the venue or a description of the location.

* Will you be having a receiving line? If so, will it take place at the end of the ceremony, the beginning of the reception, or at another point in your day?

* Please describe the events and flow for your reception. (i.e. what is the order for when you are doing dinner, toasts, first dance, cake-cutting, dancing, etc.)

* Will you be doing a special exit or send off at the end of your reception? If so, what are you planning and at what time? (i.e. bubbles, sparklers, glow sticks, confetti, etc.)

* What sounds like a perfect way to wrap up the day you get married? What would be fun to do for the last few hours before heading to bed (stargazing, toast, hot tub soak, charcuterie by a fire, etc.)?

* Are there any other locations you will be visiting on your wedding day that I should know about? If so, please explain when you will be going to this location and a description of the place.

* Many couples feel like they don’t get enough time just the two of them on their wedding day. What parts of your day do you think would be nice to have some time with just the two of you? Is there an activity you two really enjoy, something you like doing together, or maybe just a time you’d like to sit and be present to soak it all in? 

* If you have any surprises planned for your partner on your wedding day, please email me separately about this (I love helping arrange surprises\!)

* How & why did you choose your wedding location(s)? What drew you to them?

* Are there any restrictions or guidelines from your venue(s) or other vendors that I should know about? (i.e. no flash during the ceremony, if photographers are restricted to specific areas during certain parts of the day, etc.)

* When do you plan to arrive in the area where you’re getting married? And how long do you plan to stay in the area? Do you have any fun things planned (or ideas of what you’d like to do the day before or the day after you get married—either by yourselves or with guests)?

**Vendor Information**

Please provide the following information (company name, company website, contact name, and email) for all of the following vendors and skip any that are not applicable to your day.

* Officiant:   
  * Company Name/Relation to You  
  * Company Website (if applicable)  
  * Contact Name  
  * Email

* Hairstylist:  
  * Company Name  
  * Company Website  
  * Contact Name  
  * Email

* Make-up artist:  
  * Company Name  
  * Company Website  
  * Contact Name  
  * Email

* Florist:  
  * Company Name  
  * Company Website  
  * Contact Name  
  * Email

* Describe your flowers. What was the inspiration for them?

* Videographer:  
  * Company Name  
  * Company Website  
  * Contact Name  
  * Email

* Planner and/or day-of coordinator:  
  * Company Name  
  * Company Website  
  * Contact Name  
  * Email

* Caterer:  
  * Company Name  
  * Company Website  
  * Contact Name  
  * Email

* Bakery:  
  * Company Name  
  * Company Website  
  * Contact Name  
  * Email

* What was the inspiration for your wedding cake?

* DJ, band, or musician:  
  * Company Name  
  * Company Website  
  * Contact Name  
  * Email

* Venue(s):  
  * Company Name  
  * Company Website (if applicable)  
  * Contact Name  
  * Email

* Where did you both get your wedding day attire? What brand of suit, dress, etc. are you wearing?

* Who are the makers or designers of your accessories? (i.e. shoes, veil, jewelry, cufflinks, watches, etc.)

* Are there any other vendors you would like to give a shout-out to?

**Guest Information**

* How many guests will be attending?

* Are there special favors for the guests? If so, what was the inspiration for them? 

* Do you have a unique/special guestbook you would like me to photograph? 

* Please list out all members of your wedding party and their relations to you:

* Please list the formal photos you'd like me to take, including names & your relation to them. (i.e. parents, siblings, grandparents, children, close aunts/uncles/cousins, close friends, etc. Please allow about 3 minutes for each combination.) 

* Are there any special circumstances that I should be aware of in regard to any of your guests—or any awkward family situations I should be sensitive to? (i.e. accessibility needs, divorces, recent deaths, strained relationships,  etc.)

**Final Thoughts**

* Any other special instructions, confusing driving directions, or general things you think I should know? 

* Are there any important traditions I should know about ahead of time?

* Besides you two, who do you think will be the most excited to see the photos of your wedding day & why? 


* 5 years down the road, when you look back on the images of “how you got married”—what are the most important things you will want to see in them**?** 

* Is there anything else I should know as your photographer that I haven’t asked about?

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
